sections.label: Smart Home
items: Patio, Kirpa's room, String lights, Outdoor

alerts.name: Piclawd Agent Service
alerts.body: Successfully deployed Bun-powered Agent SDK service replacing CLI subprocess model. Expected improvements: 0% timeouts, <1s response time, 99%+ success rate.
alerts.lastResult: Service active and handling requests via CLI backend configuration

alerts.name: Brave Search Integration
alerts.body: Web search provider switched from Google to Brave API. Privacy-focused search with good performance and no tracking.
alerts.lastResult: Search queries responding in ~700ms with quality results

alerts.name: Home Assistant Integration
alerts.body: Home Assistant connected via Nabu Casa cloud. All sensors, lights, and controls operational with API token authentication.
alerts.lastResult: 4 lights active, solar sensors online, API responding normally

alerts.name: STR Tracker Updates
alerts.body: Daily AirDNA property updates for SF, Sierra, and Santa Cruz markets. Delivery configuration resolved.
alerts.lastResult: Delivery configuration updated - ready for next scheduled run

tasks.name: STR Market Updates
tasks.body: Scrape AirDNA data for SF, Sierra Cabins, and Santa Cruz properties. Update investment tracker.
tasks.lastResult: Delivery configuration fixed - monitoring SF market score, Sierra yields, Santa Cruz properties

tasks.name: Truck Yard Monitor
tasks.body: Monitor Central Valley truck yard properties and industrial land. Track new listings and price changes.
tasks.lastResult: Successful monitoring across Modesto, Ceres, Stockton, Manteca markets

tasks.name: UK Flight Monitor
tasks.body: Monitor SFO→LHR flights for June 2-17 trip. Track Virgin Atlantic nonstop pricing.
tasks.lastResult: Monitoring Virgin Atlantic nonstop routes - price tracking active

tasks.name: Daily Brief Generation
tasks.body: Generate morning brief with crypto prices, solar data, weather, and news headlines.
tasks.lastResult: Delivery configuration resolved for automated morning updates
